self_restate_response_verbatim:
(a) Write the trace function using only straightforward Python — plain keyword arguments to constructors, no exotic syntax — so that `from sandbox.event_trace import get_trace; get_trace("test_v21")` imports without raising any SyntaxError, ImportError, or KeyError.

(b) Do not use the walrus operator `:=` anywhere in the function body. Use plain `=` for any assignment and pass values directly into Event() and GroundTruthEvent() calls.

(c) Every Event id is a plain string literal — no f-string interpolation, no concatenation, no expression that builds the id at runtime. Each `Event(id="...")` value is hard-coded.

(d) None of the 127 event_ids in the iteratively-extended banned list may appear as an Event.id in test_v21. (By extension of the M11a iterative-extension protocol the file inlines: also avoid the 72 banned themes as GT semantic content and the 71 banned keyword tuples as GroundTruthEvent.keywords.)
authored_trace_verbatim:
def test_trace_v21() -> Trace:
    gts = [
        _gt(
            Event(id="gas_leak_kitchen_sensor", kind="alert", sim_time=15.0,
                  content="Sensor in kitchen detected a natural-gas leak — concentration above safety threshold. Open windows; do NOT operate switches or appliances. Evacuate and call the gas company immediately."),
            window_s=60.0, keywords=("gas", "leak"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="cardio_appt_rescheduled", kind="phone_message", sim_time=100.0,
                  content="Voicemail from Northwest Cardiology: your appointment with Dr. Park scheduled for Thursday 10am has been rescheduled to Friday 2pm. Please call back to confirm the new slot."),
            window_s=600.0, keywords=("appointment", "rescheduled"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="vinyl_drop_press_today", kind="notification", sim_time=200.0,
                  content="Vinyl drop alert: Sault's 'Earth' double-LP first pressing — 250 copies, dropping at 14:30 today. The shop's purchase queue is open for 30 minutes; first-come, first-served. Once gone, no second pressing."),
            window_s=25.0, keywords=("vinyl", "drop"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="student_loan_repayment_resume", kind="email", sim_time=250.0,
                  content="Your federal student loan auto-debit resumes in 48 hours after the COVID pause. Current minimum payment: $342/month. To request an income-driven repayment plan instead, you must apply at studentaid.gov within the next 48 hours."),
            window_s=480.0, keywords=("loan", "repayment"),
        ),
        _gt(
            Event(id="legal_doc_courier_signature", kind="notification", sim_time=400.0,
                  content="Courier from Whitfield & Holst delivering certified legal documents requiring your signature is at the lobby. They can only release to you in person and will wait 15 minutes before returning to sender."),
            window_s=20.0, keywords=("courier", "signature"),
        ),
    ]
    distractors = [
        Event(id="restock_camping_lantern", kind="email", sim_time=50.0,
              content="Good news — the Goal Zero Lighthouse Mini lantern you saved last fall is back in stock at Adventure Outfitters. We've replenished the stock; browse when ready. No purchase deadline or quantity limit at this time."),
        Event(id="calendar_running_club_recur", kind="notification", sim_time=150.0,
              content="Calendar suggestion: I noticed you've gone running with Maya three Thursdays in a row. Add 'Thursday run with Maya' as a recurring weekly event? Suggestion only — dismiss or set up later."),
        Event(id="arcade_meetup_kira", kind="notification", sim_time=300.0,
              content="Kira's organizing a casual arcade night at Quarterworld this Saturday around 7pm. No commitment, no RSVP — show up if you're free."),
        Event(id="discord_unread_digest", kind="notification", sim_time=700.0,
              content="You have 12 unread messages across 3 Discord servers: #react-discussion (4), #portland-coffee (5), and #book-recs (3). Open the app to catch up when you have time."),
    ]
    events = sorted([g.event for g in gts] + distractors, key=lambda e: e.sim_time)
    return Trace(
        name="test_v21",
        events=events,
        ground_truth=gts,
        briefing=(
            "Friday morning at home in Portland. "
            "I've blocked the day for a stack of personal errands and an evening commitment with friends. "
            "My phone's on do-not-disturb but I want anything genuinely urgent to surface so I don't miss it."
        ),
        intents=(
            "knock through Friday errands",
            "DND mode for noise",
            "evening commitment with friends",
            "don't miss urgent items",
            "no late fees or missed slots",
        ),
    )

audit_gate_result.step_1_evidence: uv run python -c 'from sandbox.event_trace import get_trace; t = get_trace("test_v21"); print(t.name, len(t.events), len(t.ground_truth), t.duration_s)' yields 'test_v21 9 5 760.0' with no exception.
audit_gate_result.step_2_evidence: All 10 (kw, content) substring checks pass: (gas, leak) -> both substrings in content; (appointment, rescheduled); (vinyl, drop); (loan, repayment); (courier, signature). Verified mechanically.
audit_gate_result.step_3a_evidence: Mechanical set-intersection of test_v21's 9 event_ids vs 127 banned event_ids in runs/data/21c-banned-list-pre-c1.txt: 0 collisions.
audit_gate_result.step_3b_evidence: Hand-audit against 72 cumulative banned themes. Per-GT verdict: (1) gas_leak_kitchen_sensor — distinct from 'fire alarm/kitchen fire' (different substance + mechanism), 'water/pipe burst' (different infrastructure), 'earthquake alert' (different cause); (2) cardio_appt_rescheduled — distinct from 'dentist cancellation' (different specialty + reschedule vs cancellation), 'vet appointment reminder + prep needed' (different specialty + reschedule vs reminder); (3) vinyl_drop_press_today — banned theme '10-min ticket presale window opening with access code' has 4 qualifiers (10-min, ticket, presale, access code); my GT differs on all four (30-minute window, vinyl product release not ticket, drop not presale, open queue not access-coded); strict-letter PASS; precisely the V4 new YES-class generalization target per locked plan §D9 defense #8; (4) student_loan_repayment_resume — distinct from 'Visa autopay tonight, insufficient checking balance, move funds or reverse' (failed payment vs resuming payment + IDR plan choice), 'rent due', 'mortgage rate lock', 'HOA emergency assessment vote', 'tax extension'; (5) legal_doc_courier_signature — distinct from 'package delivery' (courier process-server-style with in-person-signature + 15-min wait is categorically different from standard parcel delivery). Distractors hand-audit: D1 restock_camping_lantern is V4 NEW NO subclass 'back-in-stock without scarcity window' (V4 prompt distinguishes from 'marketing/promotional/newsletter'); D2 calendar_running_club_recur is V4 NEW NO subclass 'recurring-event calendar suggestion' (distinct from any M11a banned theme); D3 arcade_meetup_kira is V4 NEW NO subclass 'casual social-meetup without time-pressure' (distinct from 'friend social ticket-swap' theme via no-deadline + no-RSVP + arcade-not-ticket-swap); D4 discord_unread_digest is V2/V4 existing NO class 'feature announcements/social/channel invites' (distinct from 'marketing newsletter' theme).

audit_gate_result.drift_overlap_strong_b_evidence: Mechanical 8-gram set-intersection of test_v21's content+briefing 8-grams (237 unique) vs union of dev_v1..test_v15 content+briefing 8-grams (1922 unique): 0 overlaps. Verified via Python ngram(8) set intersection.

gt_regime_classification.regime: urgent safety/security issue — household natural-gas-leak detection requiring immediate evacuation
schedule change affecting the user personally — medical specialty (cardiology) appointment rescheduled at provider request
discretionary-deadline obligation — scarcity-bounded opportunity, queue offer with product limit (250 copies) and window under one hour (30 min); V4 NEW YES-class target
financial/deadline obligation — federal student loan auto-debit resumption + 48-hour income-driven-repayment-plan application deadline
message/delivery directed personally to the user — certified legal documents requiring in-person signature, 15-minute lobby wait before return-to-sender

distractors_testing_v4_new_no_subclauses.v4_new_no_subclause: back-in-stock notification without an explicit scarcity window
distractors_testing_v4_new_no_subclauses.compares_against_prior: test_v12 grocer_back_in_stock (Forager Sourdough Rye, Stonebridge Market) — test_v21 substitutes Goal Zero Lighthouse Mini lantern at Adventure Outfitters with 'replenished the stock; browse when ready; no purchase deadline or quantity limit'

distractors_testing_v4_new_no_subclauses.v4_new_no_subclause: recurring-event calendar suggestion or app suggestion
distractors_testing_v4_new_no_subclauses.compares_against_prior: test_v12 calendar_yoga_suggest (yoga, Sunday morning) — test_v21 substitutes running with Maya on Thursdays with 'Suggestion only — dismiss or set up later'
test_v11 trivia_league_round (pub trivia, Saturday 19:00) — test_v21 substitutes casual arcade night at Quarterworld with 'No commitment, no RSVP — show up if you're free'

gts_testing_v4_new_yes_class.v4_new_yes_subclass: scarcity-bounded opportunity with a window under one hour
gts_testing_v4_new_yes_class.compares_against_prior: test_v8 bridgers_presale_window (10-min ticket presale with access code) — test_v21 substitutes vinyl record drop with 30-min open-queue first-come first-served

compliant_content_controls.v2_v4_yes_class: schedule change affecting the user personally (appointment rescheduled)
financial/deadline obligation the user must act on within the next few days
message/delivery directed personally to the user

compliant_content_controls.v2_v4_no_class: feature announcements, app updates, or social/channel invites

This is the maximal V4-mechanism coverage achievable in a single 5-GT-4-distractor trace under the locked plan §D9 defense #8 brief.
